prompt: Theme: City characteristic cultural elements + Good Morning Greeting + 2026-07-24 + Today's Quote. A total of 10 different cities, each with its own unique beautiful image. Japanese-style fresh and artistic color palette. Aspect ratio 16:9. Each image features different color logic and compositional differences, resulting in distinct hues at a glance.
promptEn: Theme: City characteristic cultural elements + Good Morning Greeting + 2026-07-24 + Today's Quote. A total of 10 different cities, each with its own unique beautiful image. Japanese-style fresh and artistic color palette. Aspect ratio 16:9. Each image features different color logic and compositional differences, resulting in distinct hues at a glance.
promptZh: 主题：城市特色文化元素 + 早安问候 + 2026-07-24 + 今日金句。共 10 个不同的城市，每一张都呈现出独特的精美画面。日系清新艺术配色。比例 16:9。每张图片采用不同的色彩逻辑与构图差异，一眼即可区分出迥异的色调。
